column_description: the unique identifier of the transaction type
the name of the transaction type
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Examples: Deposit, Withdrawal, Wire Transfer, Cash Transaction, International Transfer, Payment

column_description: the risk weight of this transaction type
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
Risk weight ranges from 1 to 10. Higher values indicate higher inherent risk. Cash and international transfers typically have higher weights.
